GeneralDescription.SourceString: Daughter of a demon and founding member of the Teen Titans.
GeneralDescription.LocalizedString: Daughter of a demon and founding member of the Teen Titans.

AdditionalDescription.SourceString: Raven was investigating a disturbance on the astral plane when the Island pulled her in through a portal and left her stranded. She'll need to rely on her wits and strange new alliances if she wants to get back home again.
AdditionalDescription.LocalizedString: Raven was investigating a disturbance on the astral plane when the Island pulled her in through a portal and left her stranded. She'll need to rely on her wits and strange new alliances if she wants to get back home again.
